hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */ranker/chronoq_ranker/*.py) cd /Users/ahnaftanjid/Documents/chronoq && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" && uv run ruff format "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */ranker/chronoq_ranker/predictor.py|*/ranker/chronoq_ranker/ranker.py|*/ranker/chronoq_ranker/schemas.py|*/ranker/chronoq_ranker/config.py|*/ranker/chronoq_ranker/features.py|*/ranker/chronoq_ranker/__init__.py) echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Public API touched — invoke /architecture-check (library-architect) before merging."}' ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */.claude/*|*CLAUDE.md) echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Claude setup file touched — run /claude-audit to verify coherence."}' ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
echo '{"systemMessage": "→ Session ending. If a feature shipped: (1) update CHANGELOG.md, (2) run /chunk-review N to verify exit criteria."}'
